ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Standard country code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country (e.g., Asia, Europe, Africa) */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the country (e.g., high-income, low-income, lower-middle-income) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pisa_scores" (
  "pisa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PISA score entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the PISA score */,
  "score" INTEGER /* PISA score */,
  "reading_score" INTEGER /* Reading score */,
  "math_score" INTEGER /* Math score */,
  "science_score" INTEGER /* Science score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pisa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pisa_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "government_effectiveness" (
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each government effectiveness score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the score */,
  "score" REAL /* Government effectiveness score */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effectiveness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_government_effectiveness_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_stability" (
  "stability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political stability score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the score */,
  "score" REAL /* Political stability score */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the score (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_stability_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corruption_perceptions" (
  "corruption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corruption perceptions score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the score */,
  "score" REAL /* Corruption perceptions score */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country in the corruption perceptions index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corruption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corruption_perceptions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_rights" (
  "rights_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political rights score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the score */,
  "score" REAL /* Political rights score */,
  "electoral_process" TEXT /* Electoral process and pluralism score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rights_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_rights_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "civil_liberties" (
  "liberties_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each civil liberties score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the score */,
  "score" REAL /* Civil liberties score */,
  "freedom_of_expression" TEXT /* Freedom of expression and belief score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("liberties_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_civil_liberties_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "women_in_parliament" (
  "women_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each women in parliament entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of women in parliament */,
  "quota" TEXT /* Quota for women in parliament (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("women_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_women_in_parliament_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expropriation_risk" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expropriation risk score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the score */,
  "score" REAL /* Expropriation risk score */,
  "property_rights" TEXT /* Property rights score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expropriation_risk_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_index" (
  "happiness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness index score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the score */,
  "score" REAL /* Happiness index score */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("happiness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_index_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "human_development" (
  "development_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each human development score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the score */,
  "score" REAL /* Human development score */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("development_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_human_development_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_population" (
  "urban_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urban population entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of urban population */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("urban_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urban_population_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the country data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the country data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metadata" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES dataset_metadata ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
